The reports assign a low risk (~0.1), which is reasonable, as the code itself does not perform any malicious actions.  \n\n### My Overall Evaluation:\n\n- **Malware score:** 0 — no malicious code detected.  \n- **Obfuscated:** 0 — code is clear and standard.  \n- **Risk score:** 0.1 — the only concern is the potential for misuse if connected to malicious contracts, but this is typical for such factory code and not a flaw in the code itself.  \n\n**Conclusion:**  \nThe reports are accurate and consistent. The code is a standard, autogenerated ethers.js factory for an ERC20 interface, with no signs of malware or obfuscation.
